## Type

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — no behaviour change
- [ ] docs / chore / test

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] `make lint` passes locally
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] OpenAPI spec updated if endpoints changed
